unit.note: Full fresh suites at F0: shipwright-compliance 1305 passed / 1 skipped; shared 4730 passed / 15 skipped / 20 deselected. ruff@0.15.15 clean. anti_ratchet_check --worktree: status ok, no ratchets, no stale entries, no new crossings.

e2e.note: Producer surface: the real Group-D reader was run against the real 505-event log via the actual audit entry point (group_d.run), not a replica. D1 pass, D2 pass, D3 pass, D5 pass — D1/D3 flipped fail->pass, which is the whole point of the change.

surface_verification.justification: The user-facing surface of this change IS the audit verdict a maintainer reads. The runner drives the real group_d.run() over the real event log (amendments folded) and reports all four D-checks; a unit fixture could not show that FR-01.15 specifically stops being flagged.

degraded.condition: triage sweep-outbox reported protected_status_unplaceable for trg-b1dda91d and trg-16d374e1 at worktree setup
degraded.detail: Local main is behind origin, so two triage status appends in main's tracked log are unreachable from this branch. Pre-existing and unrelated to D1/D3/H2; resolved by delivering main (git merge origin/main), not by this iterate.

behaviors.behavior: D1 counts a tested mint (new_frs) as coverage
D1 refuses an untested mint (TT2 tests.total>0 hardening intact)
D3 counts a tested mint as delivery
D3 still flags an untested mint, so the check is not vacuous
The manifest link proof still drops an explicit-provenance minted FR with no passing link
behaviors.evidence: …::test_d1_still_drops_an_explicit_fr_without_a_passing_link PASSED — added on review; failed twice first (schema v1, then collector_version as int) because load_manifest is fail-closed

behaviors.behavior: An ineligible event type (not work_completed) covers/delivers nothing
Documented asymmetry: the affected_frs path carries no test gate
Documented asymmetry: the tests guard is per-event, not per-FR
A non-dict tests value does not crash D1/D3
The evt-edcf1064 overlay patches only tests; ts/new_frs/identity intact
Five bloat-baseline entries tightened; none loosened
behaviors.evidence: anti_ratchet_check --worktree -> status ok, stale [], new_crossings []; the update script refuses any value above origin/main's recorded number
